calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Receiver, Exonerating All Bonds, Approving And Ratifying All Of Receiver'S Acts And Transactions
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARIO SANTOS' Motion For Order Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Receiver, Exonerating All Bonds, Approving And Ratifying All Of Receiver's Acts And Transactions is Granted. Proposed order submitted with the moving paper was signed by the court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF MARIO SANTOS' Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions ($640.00) is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported = (302/HEK)

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Arthur N. Harris As Receiver

PLAINTIFF MARIO SANTOS MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER AND TO APPOINT ARTHUR N. HARRIS AS RECEIVER.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. COURT APPOINTS ARTHUR HARRIS AS RECEIVER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
